name: trial_01_penalty_too_small
deck_claim: When P_K is too small to dominate the objective swing, QAOA returns a portfolio with cardinality ≠ K (deck observed K=5/6 dominating top minima).
verdict_text: PASS — selected K=5 ≠ 4 under the deck-equivalent tiny P_K. Top-shell K distribution {6: 3, 5: 5, 4: 1, 7: 1} confirms the leakage.
